calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jan-05-2026 Continued To Sep-28-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Thomas Wrobel for administrator Hildelisa Johnson (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Status on Close of Estate.

Mr. Wrobel reported that related civil litigation involving the estate remained pending and that the trial had been continued at the request of the plaintiff. He stated that the trial was anticipated to occur in or around May and that he expected to represent the estate in that matter. He further reported that a large creditor's claim remained unresolved and that efforts to resolve the claim had been unsuccessful due to lack of responsiveness from the mortgage lender.

Following discussion, the Court continued the matter to September 28, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
